query: SELECT id, reportType, location, JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.submittedBy') as submittedBy, JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.managerName') as managerName, JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.submitterName') as submitterName FROM report_submissions WHERE location = 'MK' LIMIT 3;
